title: ‘Dangerous’: Spain wary of Saudi threat as two fight for World Cup Group H supremacy

snapshot.title: ‘Dangerous’: Spain wary of Saudi threat as two fight for World Cup Group H supremacy
snapshot.description: LONDON: Spanish knowhow is helping Saudi Arabian football to develop and at the same time using that inside knowledge to warn their countrymen to expect a tough test in Sunday’s crucial 2026 World Cup clash in Atlanta. Before the 48-team tournament kicked off, few predicted that these two teams would be level on points after the opening games in Group H as Saudi Arabia drew
snapshot.author: John Duerden
snapshot.pageTitle: ‘Dangerous’: Spain wary of Saudi threat as two fight for World Cup Group H supremacy | Arab News
